case_title: SANDPIPER COVE ASSOCIATES LLC VS. VICTOR DANIEL HIRINA

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDPIPER COVE ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDPIPER COVE ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDPIPER COVE ASSOCIATES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 301 EXECUTIVE PARK BOULEVARD #310, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SANDPIPER COVE ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDPIPER COVE ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $470.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT ( UNLAWFUL DETAINER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDPIPER COVE ASSOCIATES LLC
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT , NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDPIPER COVE ASSOCIATES LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDPIPER COVE ASSOCIATES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIRINA, VICTOR DANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT AT ISSUE $2,498.00 RENT, $200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $470.00 COSTS, $1,560.28 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,728.28, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
